/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wall -Wextra -std=c++14 -pthread -O2 -g -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/rsync_test_tool.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsync_test_tool.dir/agentEmulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsync_test_tool.dir/oneTimeSync.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsync_test_tool.dir/managerEmulator.cpp.o -o ../bin/rsync_test_tool   -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/openssl  -L/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/rsync/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/dbsync/build/lib:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/cJSON:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/external/openssl:/mnt/d/src/xsiam/agents/wazuh-agent/src/shared_modules/rsync/build/lib ../lib/librsync.so -ldbsync -ldl -lwazuhext
